---
title: "Thesis Map Final"
author: "Monique White"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# Load required packages
library(tidyverse)   # data wrangling and ggplot
library(sf)          # Spatial data handling
library(gisaimsr)    # GIS data focused in the Great Barrier Reef
library(ggspatial)   # for scale bar & north arrow
library(ggtext)      # ggplot2-rendering with element_markdown()
library(ggnewscale)  # multiple fill and colour scales in ggplot2
library(maptiles)    # download and display map tiles
library(terra)       # spatial data analysis
library(scales)      # for rgb() and hex color conversion
library(raster)      # for map
#library(ggspatial)        # VH: already loaded above
#library(sf)               # VH: already loaded above
library(dataaimsr)
library(ggrepel)         
library(ozmaps)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(ggpubr)
```

# Map of North Queensland

# Define bounding box for QLD
```{r}
NQLD_bbox <- sf::st_bbox(c(xmin = 141.5, xmax = 148,
                           ymin = -20, ymax = -10.5),
                           crs = 4326)

NQLD_bbox_sf <- sf::st_as_sfc(NQLD_bbox)

NQLD_tiles <- get_tiles(x = NQLD_bbox_sf,
                        provider = "Esri.WorldImagery",
                        crop = TRUE,
                        zoom = 7)

# If error appears trying to run the previous line, run this code below:
#lib_paths <- .libPaths()
#cmd <- sprintf("find %s -name proj.db -print 2>/dev/null", paste(shQuote(lib_paths), collapse=" "))
#cat(system(cmd, intern = TRUE), sep = "\n")
#proj_db <- system(cmd, intern = TRUE)[1]
#Sys.setenv(PROJ_LIB = dirname(proj_db))

NQLD_df <- as.data.frame(NQLD_tiles, xy = TRUE)        # Convert to data frame for ggplot

# Take columns 3, 4, and 5, and divide values by 255 (values in them range from 0 to 255 because they're RGB values). This turns values into a scale 0-1
NQLD_df$fill <- rgb(NQLD_df[,3] / 255,
                    NQLD_df[,4] / 255,
                    NQLD_df[,5] / 255)

NGBR_rect <- data.frame(xmin = 144.95,
                        xmax = 145.6,
                        ymin = -14.95,
                        ymax = -14.4)
```

```{r}
NQLD_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(
    data = NQLD_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = fill)
  ) +
  
  geom_rect(
    data = NGBR_rect,
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax,
        ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
    fill = NA,
    colour = "white",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_identity() +
  
  coord_equal(
    xlim = c(141.5, 148),
    ylim = c(-20, -10.5),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  # annotation_scale(
  #   height = unit(0.15, "cm"),
  #   location = "br",
  #   width_hint = 0.2,
  #   pad_x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
  #   pad_y = unit(0.4, "cm"),
  #   text_col = "white",
  #   text_cex = 0.4,
  #   bar_cols = c("white", "black")
  # ) +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())+
  theme(
    #plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5),
    # axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 5)),
    # axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 5)),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
NQLD_plot
```

```{r}
library(readxl)

NGBR_sites_for_coral_settlement_tiles <- read_excel("~/Larval recruitment resources/Maps/NGBR sites for coral settlement tiles.xlsx",
                                                  col_types = c("text", "numeric", "numeric", "text", "text"))

# # Set the working directory
# setwd("/Users/jc312878/Documents/Hoey Lab/Teaching/HDR Students/Monique White MMB Research Project/Monique White - Thesis map figure")

NGBR_sites_for_coral_settlement_tiles <- read_excel("NGBR sites for coral settlement tiles.xlsx", 
                                                    col_types = c("text", "numeric", "numeric", "text", "text"))

coords <- NGBR_sites_for_coral_settlement_tiles |> 
  mutate(Lat = -abs(Lat),
         Site = factor(Site),
         shelf_pos = factor(Shelf_Position),
         Reef = factor(Reef))

study.sites <- janitor::clean_names(coords)                          


# Convert study.sites to sf object with coordinates and assign CRS
study.sites.sf <- st_as_sf(study.sites, coords = c("long", "lat"), crs = 4326)

study.sites.sf.coords <- st_coordinates(study.sites.sf)
study.sites.sf$longitude <- study.sites.sf.coords[, 1]
study.sites.sf$latitude <- study.sites.sf.coords[, 2]
```

#NGBR 

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 1. Define bbox in lon/lat
# ----------------------------
NGBR_b_box <- st_bbox(c(xmin = 144.85, xmax = 145.7,
                        ymin = -14.95, ymax = -14.35),
                      crs = 4326)

NGBR_bbox_sf <- st_as_sfc(NGBR_b_box)

# ----------------------------
# 2. Project bbox to UTM 55S
# (correct for ~145E, 15S)
# ----------------------------
utm_crs <- 32755  # WGS84 / UTM zone 55S

NGBR_bbox_utm <- st_transform(NGBR_bbox_sf, crs = utm_crs)

# ----------------------------
# 3. Get imagery tiles (projected)
# ----------------------------
NGBR_tiles <- get_tiles(
  x = NGBR_bbox_utm,
  provider = "Esri.WorldImagery",
  crop = TRUE,
  zoom = 11
)

# Convert tiles to dataframe for ggplot
NGBR_df <- as.data.frame(NGBR_tiles, xy = TRUE)

# RGB → hex colour
NGBR_df$fill <- rgb(
  NGBR_df[, 3] / 255,
  NGBR_df[, 4] / 255,
  NGBR_df[, 5] / 255
)

# ----------------------------
# 4. Define rectangles in lon/lat
# ----------------------------
Inner_rect <- st_as_sfc(st_bbox(
  c(xmin = 145.16, xmax = 145.225,
     ymin = -14.755, ymax = -14.695),
  crs = 4326
))

Mid_rect <- st_as_sfc(st_bbox(
  c(xmin = 145.42, xmax = 145.51,
    ymin = -14.72, ymax = -14.63),
  crs = 4326
))

Outer_rect <- st_as_sfc(st_bbox(
  c(xmin = 145.44, xmax = 145.57,
    ymin = -14.54, ymax = -14.42),
  crs = 4326
))

# Project rectangles to UTM
Inner_rect_utm <- st_transform(Inner_rect, utm_crs)
Mid_rect_utm   <- st_transform(Mid_rect, utm_crs)
Outer_rect_utm <- st_transform(Outer_rect, utm_crs)

# To crop the plot (latitude)
# Latitude limits you want (degrees)
lat_limits <- c(-14.85, -14.35)  # bottom, top

# Pick a representative longitude inside your map (any within bbox is fine)
lon_ref <- mean(c(144.85, 145.7))

# Convert those latitudes to UTM northings
lat_pts_utm <- sf::st_as_sf(data.frame(lon = lon_ref, lat = lat_limits),
                            coords = c("lon", "lat"),
                            crs = 4326) |>
  sf::st_transform(utm_crs)

y_limits_utm <- sf::st_coordinates(lat_pts_utm)[, 2]



NGBR_plot <- ggplot() +

  # Satellite imagery
  geom_raster(data = NGBR_df,
              aes(x = x, y = y, fill = fill)) +

  scale_fill_identity() +

  # Rectangles
  geom_sf(data = Inner_rect_utm,
          fill = NA,
          colour = "#A8C85A",
          linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = Mid_rect_utm,
          fill = NA,
          colour = "#9e379f",
          linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = Outer_rect_utm,
          fill = NA,
          colour = "#C97B5F",
          linewidth = 1) +

  # Scale bar (push up a bit to clear the in-panel x-axis title)
  annotation_scale(
    location = "br",                 # bottom-right anchor
    height   = unit(0.15, "cm"),     # bar height
    width_hint = 0.2,                # relative bar length
    pad_x    = unit(0.5, "cm"),      # right padding
    pad_y    = unit(1.0, "cm"),      # bottom padding, increase to push up
    text_col = "white",              # label colour
    text_cex = 0.4,                  # label size
    bar_cols = c("black", "white"),  # bar colours
    line_col = "white") +            # bar border colour

  coord_sf(crs    = utm_crs,                # plot CRS
           ylim   = range(y_limits_utm),    # crop in UTM northings
           expand = FALSE) +                # no expansion beyond limits

  # Axes titles
  labs(x = "Longitude",                    # x-axis title
       y = "Latitude") +                   # y-axis title
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),                                  # remove grid
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.6),  # white ticks
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.22, "cm"),                         # negative, ticks go inward
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.6),   # draw axis lines
        axis.text  = element_text(colour = "black"),    # pull tick labels into panel
        axis.title = element_text(colour = "black"),     # pull axis title into panel
           # pull axis title into panel
        plot.margin = margin(t = 6, r = 6, b = 6, l = 6))         # small breathing room



NGBR_plot
```

 

```{r}
# top_map <- ggarrange(NQLD_plot, NGBR_plot, widths = c(1,2))
# bottom_map <- ggarrange(Inner_shelf, Mid_shelf, Outer_shelf, ncol = 3)

# map <- ggarrange(top_map, bottom_map, ncol=1, heights = c(1.5, 1))
```

```{r}
# ggsave(filename = "Thesis_Map.pdf",
#        plot = NGBR_plot,
#        width = 9,
#        height = 5,
#        units = "in",
#        dpi = 300)
```


# Inner Shelf

```{r}
# 1. Define Inner shelf bbox (lon/lat)
inner_bbox <- st_bbox(
  c(
    xmin = 145.16, xmax = 145.225,
    ymin = -14.755, ymax = -14.695
  ),
  crs = 4326
)

inner_bbox_sf <- st_as_sfc(inner_bbox)

# ----------------------------
# 2. Project bbox to UTM 55S
# ----------------------------
utm_crs <- 32755  # WGS84 / UTM zone 55S

inner_bbox_utm <- st_transform(inner_bbox_sf, utm_crs)

# ----------------------------
# 3. Get satellite tiles (projected)
# ----------------------------
inner_tiles <- get_tiles(
  x = inner_bbox_utm,
  provider = "Esri.WorldImagery",
  crop = TRUE,
  zoom = 14        # ↑ use high zoom for small area
)

# Convert tiles to data frame
inner_df <- as.data.frame(inner_tiles, xy = TRUE)

# RGB → hex colour
inner_df$fill <- rgb(
  inner_df[, 3] / 255,
  inner_df[, 4] / 255,
  inner_df[, 5] / 255
)

# ----------------------------
# 4. Filter + project study sites
# ----------------------------
inner.sites.sf <- study.sites.sf |>
  filter(shelf_pos == "Inner") |>
  st_transform(utm_crs)

# ----------------------------
# 5. Plot
# ----------------------------
Inner_shelf <- ggplot() +
  
  # Satellite imagery
  geom_raster(
    data = inner_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = fill)
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  
  # Study sites
  geom_sf(
    data = inner.sites.sf,
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.5,
    alpha = 0.8,
    fill = "#A8C85A",
    color = "grey10"
  ) +
  
  # Correct scale bar (metres)
  annotation_scale(
    height = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    location = "br",
    width_hint = 0.2,
    pad_x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    pad_y = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    text_col = "white",
    text_cex = 0.4,
    bar_cols = c("white", "black")
  ) +
  
  # Projected coordinate system
  coord_sf(
    crs = utm_crs,
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Easting (m)",
    y = "Northing (m)"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank()
    # axis.ticks = unit(0.05)
  )

Inner_shelf

```



# Mid Shelf

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 1. Define Mid shelf bbox (lon/lat)
# ----------------------------
mid_bbox <- st_bbox(
  c(
    xmin = 145.42, xmax = 145.51,
    ymin = -14.72, ymax = -14.63
  ),
  crs = 4326
)

mid_bbox_sf <- st_as_sfc(mid_bbox)

# ----------------------------
# 2. Project bbox to UTM 55S
# ----------------------------
utm_crs <- 32755  # WGS84 / UTM zone 55S

mid_bbox_utm <- st_transform(mid_bbox_sf, utm_crs)

# ----------------------------
# 3. Get satellite tiles (projected)
# ----------------------------
mid_tiles <- get_tiles(
  x = mid_bbox_utm,
  provider = "Esri.WorldImagery",
  crop = TRUE,
  zoom = 14
)

# Convert tiles to data frame
mid_df <- as.data.frame(mid_tiles, xy = TRUE)

# RGB → hex colour
mid_df$fill <- rgb(
  mid_df[, 3] / 255,
  mid_df[, 4] / 255,
  mid_df[, 5] / 255
)

# ----------------------------
# 4. Filter + project study sites
# ----------------------------
mid.sites.sf <- study.sites.sf |>
  filter(shelf_pos == "Mid") |>
  st_transform(utm_crs)

# ----------------------------
# 5. Plot
# ----------------------------
Mid_shelf <- ggplot() +
  
  # Satellite imagery
  geom_raster(
    data = mid_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = fill)
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  
  # Study sites
  geom_sf(
    data = mid.sites.sf,
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.5,
    alpha = 0.8,
    fill = "#9e379f",
    color = "grey10"
  ) +
  
  # Correct scale bar (metres)
  annotation_scale(
    height = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    location = "br",
    width_hint = 0.2,
    pad_x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    pad_y = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    text_col = "white",
    text_cex = 0.4,
    bar_cols = c("white", "black")
  ) +

  # Projected coordinates
  coord_sf(
    crs = utm_crs,
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Easting (m)",
    y = "Northing (m)"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank()
  )

Mid_shelf
```

# Outer Shelf

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 1. Define Outer shelf bbox (lon/lat)
# ----------------------------
outer_bbox <- st_bbox(
  c(xmin = 145.44, xmax = 145.57,
    ymin = -14.54, ymax = -14.42),
  crs = 4326
)

outer_bbox_sf <- st_as_sfc(outer_bbox)

# ----------------------------
# 2. Project bbox to UTM 55S
# ----------------------------
utm_crs <- 32755  # WGS84 / UTM zone 55S

outer_bbox_utm <- st_transform(outer_bbox_sf, utm_crs)
Outer_rect_utm <- st_transform(Outer_rect, utm_crs)

# ----------------------------
# 3. Get satellite tiles (projected)
# ----------------------------
outer_tiles <- get_tiles(
  #x = outer_bbox_utm,
  x = Outer_rect_utm,
  provider = "Esri.WorldImagery",
  crop = TRUE,
  zoom = 14
)

# Convert tiles to data frame
outer_df <- as.data.frame(outer_tiles, xy = TRUE)

# RGB → hex colour
outer_df$fill <- rgb(
  outer_df[, 3] / 255,
  outer_df[, 4] / 255,
  outer_df[, 5] / 255
)

# ----------------------------
# 4. Filter + project study sites
# ----------------------------
outer.sites.sf <- study.sites.sf |>
  filter(shelf_pos == "Outer") |>
  st_transform(utm_crs)

# ----------------------------
# 5. Plot
# ----------------------------
Outer_shelf <- ggplot() +
  
  # Satellite imagery
  geom_raster(
    data = outer_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = fill)
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  
  # Study sites
  geom_sf(
    data = outer.sites.sf,
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.5,
    alpha = 0.8,
    fill = "#C97B5F",
    color = "grey10"
  ) +
  
  # Correct scale bar (metres)
  annotation_scale(
    height = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    location = "br",
    width_hint = 0.2,
    pad_x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    pad_y = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    text_col = "white",
    text_cex = 0.4,
    bar_cols = c("white", "black")
  ) +
  
  # Projected coordinates (clip OFF for inside axes)
  coord_sf(
    crs = utm_crs,
    expand = FALSE,
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank()
  )

Outer_shelf

```

# Inset

```{r}
library(cowplot)
NGBR_with_inset <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(NGBR_plot) +
  draw_plot(
    NQLD_plot,
    x = 0.025,        # horizontal position (0–1)
    y = 0.60,       # vertical position (0–1)
    width = 0.35,
    height = 0.35)

NGBR_with_inset
```

```{r}
bottom_map <- ggarrange(Inner_shelf, Mid_shelf, Outer_shelf, ncol = 3, widths = c(1.014, 1.032, 1.034), labels = c("B", "C", "D"))

full_map <- ggarrange(NGBR_with_inset, bottom_map, ncol = 1, heights = c(2.15, 1.3), labels = c("A", ""))
```

# Full Map
```{r}
full_map
```

```{r}
ggsave(filename = "Thesis_map.png",
       plot = full_map,
       width = 9,
       height = 8.7,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 300)

ggsave(filename = "Thesis_Map.pdf",
       plot = full_map,
       width = 9,
       height = 8.7,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 300)

```
